record.field: result = model.manual_backfill_invoice_lines() env.cr.commit() msg = ( 'Procesadas {invoices_processed} facturas, ' '{lines_pushed} lineas. ' 'Cursor: {last_id_processed}. ' 'Terminado: {finished}. ' 'Tiempo: {elapsed_seconds}s.' ).format(**result) action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Backfill invoice_lines', 'message': msg, 'type': 'success' if result['finished'] else 'warning', 'sticky': True, }, }

result = model.manual_backfill_cfdi_states() env.cr.commit() msg = ( 'Procesadas {invoices_processed} facturas, ' '{rows_updated} actualizadas en Supabase. ' 'Cursor: {last_id_processed}. ' 'Terminado: {finished}. ' 'Tiempo: {elapsed_seconds}s.' ).format(**result) action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Backfill cfdi_states', 'message': msg, 'type': 'success' if result['finished'] else 'warning', 'sticky': True, }, }

result = model.manual_backfill_account_payments() env.cr.commit() msg = ( 'Procesados {payments_processed} pagos, ' '{rows_pushed} pusheados a Supabase. ' 'Cursor: {last_id_processed}. ' 'Terminado: {finished}. ' 'Tiempo: {elapsed_seconds}s.' ).format(**result) action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Backfill account_payments', 'message': msg, 'type': 'success' if result['finished'] else 'warning', 'sticky': True, }, }
